frontend_changes.map_toggle: Development Hotspots toggle added to Layer Registry
frontend_changes.selection_behavior: Hotspot marker clicks dispatch the existing parcel inspection event so selected parcel detail, boundary highlight, development activity, and permit events reuse the current selected parcel flow.

fallback_behavior.backend_unavailable: Hotspot overlay reports unavailable/error and draws no markers.
fallback_behavior.static_mode: Static generated hotspot artifacts are not used for map markers because they do not include map-safe coordinates.
fallback_behavior.missing_coordinates: Rows without real centroid coordinates are skipped.

validation.visual_browser_smoke: not available; no Browser/Playwright tool was exposed in this session

remaining_map_intelligence_gaps: Visual click smoke should be confirmed in the browser by toggling Development Hotspots and selecting a marker.
Temporal map playback remains future work.
Permit heat/cluster styling remains future work.
Map extent filtering for hotspot queries remains future work.
